nasb.text: Now, O Lord God, You are God, and Your words are truth, and You have promised this good thing to Your servant.

esv.text: And now, O Lord God, you are God, and your words are true, and you have promised this good thing to your servant.

cnv.text: 主耶和華啊！你是　神；你的話是真實可信的。你向你僕人應許了這美好的福分。

ccb.text: 主耶和华啊，只有你是上帝，你的话真实可靠，你给了仆人美好的应许。
